title: E. Chu Optimization Technique Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the key steps and iterative process of the E. Chu optimization technique, a method used for solving complex optimization problems.
relationships: Flow from Problem Initialization to Parameter Tuning
Flow from Parameter Tuning to Solution Generation
Flow from Solution Generation to Fitness Evaluation
Decision flow from Fitness Evaluation (if criteria met -> Optimal Solution, else -> loop back to Parameter Tuning)
